comments: I love how editing team saw earwax at 1:37 and said "lets upload it"
I’ve had the pros  2 for over two years, and they haven’t skipped a beat. They are honestly worth every penny.
When I was this early my wife got pregnant
Got some leather cover that gotta say is phenomenal, my airpods are looking so nice
Everyone is talking about the earwax, but I just appreciate Marques keeping it real
As a musician, the transparency mode is great for practicing with a background track and being able to hear a more accurate version of how I sound when compared to what I think I sound like.
6:52 average next cubicle employee

Marques, I am a senior citizen with a significant hearing loss. I used the AP 2's for the past couple of years with good results, BUT the AP 3's are a brand new level of help, and I can't say enough about the new sound and fit. Bravo Apple! Well done.

I’ve had my AirPods Pro 2 go thru not one. Not 2. But three full rounds in the washer machine. By mistake leaving them in my pockets without checking and let them dry over night. Came back to life within 24-48 hours. They arent fully water resistant but they can 100% come back to life with the proper aftercare. That’s some good tech.
There's an apple engineer that worked on this design somewhere cheering that they got the first airpod that stays in his ears.
1:40 surely clean the old ones lol
My pro 2 still rocking, still a lot of worth. If anything, maybe cover them with something because they've lost a bit of luster
When i saw how clean the AirPods Pro 2's were at 1:40, I knew half of the comments were going to be about it
2:10 standing over a grate holding an AirPod. That’s the level of self confidence I strive for.

I’ve had mine since 2020. Long painful runs in the rain, sun and snow, multiple washer cycles, breakups, loneliness, happiness, people dying, the case got set on fire (they look like shit), I lost and found them so many times. almost every hike I’ve done alone, almost every bike ride, most days at work, audiobooks, long distance calls at Christmas to my family. The last 5 years of my life my AirPod pros have weirdly been a companion. Like an extension of myself. Like a plug that immerses me into the virtual world  in my ear. It sounds corny but it’s true. They’re still going. The batteries are getting a bit weaker. When they die or the battery gets unbearable I’ll definitely get the new ones.

The ANC is my favourite part of these new pods. It's honestly insane when you turn it on and hear little to nothing but the sound of your music, podcast, or the video I'm watching right now, it amplifies the sound quality because you can clearly read the song.

finally retiring the OG airpods pro from 2019. You have done your job all these years.
Airpods pro 3 arriving friday!

Update: Waw The sound difference is incredible. you definitely hear the difference. It's just so crisp compared to the old ones. love it! 

Will be testing ANC next week on the plane :D
9:41 Humane still catching strays 😭
Sometimes the ‘small’ changes like dust resistance outlast the flashy features, longevity is an underrated part of innovation.
I covered my AP with some real nice piece of leather and I regret nothing. Pretty good

ranked.transcript: When the initial AirPods Pro 3 reviews came out, every major reviewer basically said the same thing. The sound quality was excellent and the noise cancellation was quite improved from the AirPods Pro 2. But all of them ended up missing the biggest downside that I've run into with the AirPods Pro 3, which didn't show up until several weeks after launch, which is exactly why I review things over the long term, because some issues just don't show up in 2 weeks. So, what is this big issue with the AirPods Pro 3? Well, a few weeks into using them constantly, I started to notice weird background sounds while using ANC. It sounds kind of hollow, almost like this oceanlike noise, as if there was like just some sound leakage problem with the AirPods Pro 3. And I'd notice this with the sound of my own voice when I'm writing at my Mac and reading out scripts to myself or the noise of just typing on a keyboard or weirdly a sound like rustling a plastic bag. That's something that definitely triggers it as well. Now, all of these were sounds that the AirPods Pro 3 were canceling out fine when I first got them. And even without any active noise, the background noise you hear at times would just sound slightly echoey or hollow as well. Now, at first I thought, well, maybe this is just a fit issue, or maybe the AirPods Pro just got dirty. I did the ear tip test. I actually tried a size up and size down, and the issues still occurred. So, it's clearly not a fit issue. I got the AirPods cleaning kit from Apple and cleaned them following Apple's instructions. That didn't fix it either. Okay, so maybe it's just a software glitch. So, I unpaired them from my iPhone and other Apple devices and I reset them by doubletapping the front of the case continuously, which is how you do it now since there's no Bluetooth pairing button on the back. And that didn't resolve it either. So, at that point, I went to Reddit and sure enough, other users were complaining of similar issues. But given how many AirPods Pro Apple sells, and even though there were numerous posts about this, I figured perhaps all of these people, myself included, we just got faulty pairs of AirPods. So, a few weeks ago, like any sane person would do, I bought another pair of AirPods Pro 3. I took them out of their case, put them in, and everything sounded great. The noise cancellation was perfect for about 45 minutes and then there it was, that hollow background noise again. So, at this point, it's very unlikely that I just got two faulty pairs of AirPods that were manufactured months apart from each other. So, I went back to Reddit and realized I had missed a key detail that someone had pointed out. When this hollow noise appears, if you trigger transparency mode and then switch back to noise cancellation again, it apparently disappears. And sure enough, that was my experience as well, making it likely that this issue that I've been plagued with is actually a software issue. Or at least that's my best guess at this point. And if you've noticed a similar issue with your AirPods Pro 3 or just had the noise cancellation degrade but don't notice that hollow sound as much, do definitely let me know in the comments. And if you want to see more long-term reviews like this one, by the way, a thumbs up on this video does go a long way to supporting us, as well as, of course, making sure you're subscribed. All right, so I can just end the video now and say I don't recommend these, right? It's actually a little bit more complicated than that. Uh, one, this is an issue that I do not think is affecting everybody who bought uh these AirPods. Otherwise, you'd be seeing even way more threads and comments about this issue online. So, either this is an issue that is only affecting certain people's uh AirPods, maybe it's like the internal mics and different people's ear shapes are interacting with them differently. So, that's why some people experience it while others don't. Or this is an issue that is impacting everybody's AirPods, but only certain people notice it or can hear it. With audio, audio is kind of weird. People perceive audio differently. I could also see that argument being plausible as well. But the real reason I just can't say I 100% don't recommend these is even with the issue I've had with them. I find myself still using them quite often because of the highlights like noise cancellation when it's actually working. These buds are quite a bit better than the AirPods Pro 2, blocking out more background noise, especially for higher frequencies that I could actually use them while cooking, which I could never do with the Pro 2 because they didn't block out enough of those higher frequency noises. Overall, I think the AirPods Pro 3 noise cancellation is actually right in line with my new Sony WF1000 XM6s, which I'm currently reviewing. Now, given that the XM 6s don't have that degradation issue that I've had with the AirPods Pro 3, plus they come with foam tips that are all foam tips and just still give you better passive noise isolation overall. I think they still remain the better option for noise cancellation. Now, the AirPods Pro 3 did introduce some foam into their tips, which is part of why their noise cancellation is better than the previous generation, but they still have that classic silicon outer layer. I've noticed with the AirPods Pro 3 specifically, after long listening sessions, I'll notice my ear canal will have just like a tiny layer of condensation. Like not like beaded water or anything like that, but you can just tell that there's a little bit of condensation in there. That's something I did not notice with my previous generation of AirPods as much and something I also don't get with the Sony's. 번역되는 언어가 내 귀로 들리는 그런 방식이었어요. >> 실제로 한국어 번역도 꽤 잘 됐어요. 그러니까 이게 소통하기 무리 없을 정도. 심지어 실시간 번역을 쓰잖아요. 그럼 아이폰에서 번역에 비면서 또 요거를 문자로 볼 수도 있었고요. 요즘 우리 AI가 많이 발전하면서 LLM이라고 해서 뭐 GPT나 재미나이 보면 내가 처음에 물었던 거 외에도 큰틀을 보면서 앞뒤에 문맥을 파악하면서 대답해 주는 것에 비해 얘는 그냥 우리가 일반 번역을 하는 것처럼 앞뒤에 문맥을 파악하지 못하다 보니까 그 점이 좀 단점이었어요. 그리고 기본적인 H2칩은 동일하지만 광대역 칩이 U1에서 U2로 업그레이드 되었습니다. 요것도 재밌는게 뭐냐면 애플에서 첫 번째 울트라 와이드 밴드 초광대역 칩을 유원이라고 정의를 했어요. 근데 아이폰 15대 요거를 계산하면서 2세대 초광제역 칩이라고 언급을 했거든요. 근데 이번 에어팟 프로 3에서는 또 유트라고 하더라고요. 그러니까 이게 약간 좀 족보가 꼬인 거지. 그래서 스펙도 보잖아요. 그럼 2세대 초광대역치비 유원 대비 최대 세배 인식 거래가 늘어났고 그래서 요것도 2세대 초광대역 칩이 그냥 이번에 유원칩으로 이름이 다시 바뀐게 아닐까 같은 칩이 아닐까 해서 찾아봤거든요. 근데 좀 다른 거 같더라고요. 왜냐면 유원칩을 탑재한 프로 2 대비 1.5배 인식 범위가 더 넓고 향상된 인식은 또 새로운 아이폰 에어 17시리즈에서만 지원한다는 것을 보면 이게 좀이 이상해요. 아무튼 오늘은 많은 분들께서 기다리신 에어팟 프로에 대해서 살펴봤습니다. 전반적인 평가로 하자면 노이즈 캔슬링은 이미 프로투도 좋았기 때문에 미친듯한 체감은 아니었고 오히려 음질적인 부분에서의 체감이 저는 더 크게 다가왔습니다. 그리고 운동하시는 분들은 신박수 측정 기능이 들어갔기 때문에 요즘도 좀 좋을 것 같고요. 특히 제가 아침에 운동 가다 보면 에프러워치를 안 들고 가서 아 신박수 측정해야 되는데 칼로리 측정해야 되는데 이렇게 하면서 다시 집에 갔다가 나오는 케이스도 많았거든요. 근데 에어팟은 보통 운동할 때 음악을 대부분 듣다 보니까 고점도 좀 편해지지 않을까? 다만 한 가지 걱정이라면 착용감의 호보로가 좀 많이 심할 거라는 거. 저는 지금 요렇게 간단하게 체험해 봐도 프로 3를 끼울 때마다 큐가 아파. 아무튼 오늘 여기까지요. 아까 말한 것처럼 착용감에서 크게 불편함이었다면 장반적으로 모든 부분에서 업그레이드이다.

judgement.community_consensus: 에어팟 프로3는 음질, 노캔, 신박수 측정 기능이 크게 개선되었으며, 특히 음질 향상이 두드러진다. 그러나 착용감에 대한 호불호가 분명하며, 기존 프로2 사용자 중 일부는 업그레이드를 고민 중이다.

ranked.title: AirPods Pro 3 Review in 60 Seconds!
ranked.description:
This is our 60 seconds reviews of AirPords Pro 3 with pros and cons, and we are doing this review after using these earbuds for over 2 weeks now. Apple claims “world’s best ANC”, and when you put them on, you really feel it. Your annoying colleague’s voice completely shuts down and even when you are on the road, the traffic noise is barely audible and when you start playing music, you can be in your world. To achieve this, Apple has redesigned the buds. The eartips are now foam-infused, so you get a much better seal and they are now IP57 rated too. They also come with a custom PPG sensor to track your heart rate, which is pretty accurate, and you can even see the calories burnt, just by using the buds. There’s also a new Live Translation feature that works “fine”, but the languages are very limited. There’s no Indian language as of yet. When it comes to the sound quality? The bass is super good and punchy, mids are crisp and the treble is also well-extended. But in certain songs, the bass is overpowering the vocals, so it’s not for everyone. So, if I have to rank them, bass-wise, AirPods Pro 3 is on top, but in overall sound quality, Sony WF-1000XM5 are still the best. Other than that, I love the new improved spatial audio, as the head tracking works perfectly, and the Transparency mode also feels very natural and spot on. Lastly, the battery life on the buds have also increased to 10 hours now, and the case gets an upgraded UWB chip for faster finding. And yeah, there are no buttons this time, you just have to double tap on the front for pairing. Finally, if you are wondering about the mic quality, it's also very loud and crisp, be it inside or outside. Overall, Apple has really nailed the AirPods Pro 3 this time.

Subscribe to @beebomco for more such cool 60-Second tech reviews!

finalVerdict.one_line_verdict: Apple AirPods Pro 3는 iPhone 사용자에게 최적화된 ANC 성능과 편안한 착용감을 제공하지만, 이어팁 청결 문제와 가격 상승이 단점이다.
finalVerdict.summary: Apple AirPods Pro 3는 이어팁 디자인 개선으로 착용감이 향상되었으며, ANC 성능이 이전 세대 대비 2배 향상되었다. IP57 방수 기능과 배터리 수명 연장도 주요 강점이다. 그러나 이어팁 청결 문제와 일부 사용자에게 발생하는 ANC 저하 현상, 그리고 가격 상승이 단점으로 지적된다. iPhone 사용자나 소음 환경에서 사용하는 사람에게 적합하지만, 순수 음질을 중시하거나 Android 사용자는 다른 제품을 고려하는 것이 좋다.
finalVerdict.upgrade_advice: 기존 AirPods Pro 2 사용자라면, ANC 성능 향상과 편안한 착용감을 경험하기 위해 업그레이드를 고려할 수 있지만, 가격 상승과 이어팁 청결 문제를 고려해 신중하게 결정해야 한다.
finalVerdict.buying_advice: 신규 구매자라면 iPhone 사용자나 소음 환경에서 사용하는 사람에게 적합하며, ANC 성능과 편안한 착용감을 중시한다면 추천된다. 그러나 순수 음질을 중시하거나 Android 사용자는 다른 제품을 고려하는 것이 좋다.
